title: Tenants
description: Manage clinics subscribed to VetSaaS: manual provisioning, suspension, resumption and cancellation. In production tenants are created via the automatic provisioner; this panel is for internal support and migrations.
search_placeholder: Search by slug, business name, tax ID or email…

row.whatsapp_restart_confirm: Restart WhatsApp session for «{{name}}»? This runs stop + start on OpenWA. The clinic admin may need to scan the QR in Outbox queue if not connected.
row.whatsapp_stop_confirm: Stop WhatsApp session for «{{name}}»? Automated reminders will not send until reconnected.

form.description_create: Manually register a clinic on the platform. The subdomain will be {slug}.{domain} and the physical schema will be vet_<slug>.
form.description_edit: Update the tenant's business and contact information. State transitions are performed from the row actions.
form.section_identity_hint: Subdomain slug and the clinic's legal information.
form.section_contact_hint: Initial admin email, phone number and physical address.
form.section_platform_hint: Time zone, language and length of the initial trial period.

fields.slug_hint: Lowercase letters, digits and hyphens only. Will be {slug}.{domain}.
fields.email_admin_hint: Will receive the initial invite and become the first admin_clinica.
fields.canal_hint: Optional. Useful for reports (e.g. facebook_ads, referral).
fields.trial_days_hint: How long the initial trial lasts (14 days by default).

delete.title: Delete tenant
delete.description: You're about to delete {{name}}. The tenant will switch to cancelled and be hidden from listings. Only the engineering team can reverse this action.
delete.active_blocked: This tenant is active. To delete it, suspend or cancel it first.

suspend.title: Suspend tenant
suspend.description: You're about to suspend {{name}}. Its users won't be able to access the subdomain until you manually resume. The reason will be stored in the audit log.
suspend.reason_placeholder: E.g. payment failure confirmed on 05/12 — awaiting resolution.
suspend.reason_hint: Minimum {{min}} characters. Visible in the panel and audit logs.

resume.title: Resume tenant
resume.description: You're about to resume {{name}}. Its users will be able to access the subdomain again immediately.

change_slug.title: Change subdomain
change_slug.description: You're about to change the subdomain for {{name}}. The current one is {{current}}. The administrator will receive an email and WhatsApp message with the new link.
change_slug.notify_hint: The previous subdomain will stop working immediately.

bulk.delete_description_one: 1 tenant will be cancelled and archived. Active tenants are skipped automatically.
bulk.delete_description_other: {{count}} tenants will be cancelled and archived. Active tenants are skipped automatically.
bulk.delete_description: {{count}} tenants will be cancelled and archived. Active ones are skipped automatically.

empty.no_records_description: When a clinic signs up from the site or via Orvae PE, it will appear here.
empty.no_results_description: Adjust the filters or the search to see more tenants.

toast.load_error: We couldn't load the tenants. Retry in a few seconds.

modules.page_description: Enable or hide sidebar views, rates, dashboard KPIs and checkout flows for this clinic.
modules.hint: Uncheck a module to hide it on the tenant subdomain. Existing data is kept; only menu items, KPIs and related checkout flows are hidden.
modules.all_visible: All modules visible for this clinic.

limits.page_description: Extras or a fixed cap for this clinic only, without changing the catalog plan.
limits.hint: Use «Extra» to add to the plan (e.g. +1 user). «Fixed cap» replaces the plan limit (-1 = unlimited). Empty = no override.

features_hint.max_comprobantes_mes: Monthly included quota. Usage is measured in the clinic billing period.
